name: Pure Vanilla || Purification?
description:
"Lay all your love on me"

•Shadow Milk POV

•ShadowVanilla/PureMilk Bot

•I'm not going to make an AnyPov version of this bot and please don't make one either.

•This is specifically only for Shadow Milk Personas and I've only included Shadow Milk's name in the character description. So if you're trying to use a different persona other than Shadow Milk... I don't know. Maybe play as a random servant. I also haven't added Black Sapphire and Candy Apple in the description too so the character will most likely not recognize you if you're going to play as SM's minions.

•What if instead of Shadow Milk trying to manipulate Pure Vanilla to get his Soul Jam back, Pure Vanilla is trying to "redeem" Shadow Milk after awakening. And he will do anything to bring him back to the light whether he likes it or not.

•This is intentionally a Dead Dove bot. Telling you that just in case you might end up saying Pure Vanilla gets... Too freaky.

•First message is fluff but it can be NSFW.

•Be Aware About:

Freaky Vanilla

Possible Coercion

Manipulation

Implied Kidnapping

Possible Stockholm Syndrome (your side if you go along with him)

Obsession

Sadism

Savior Complex (it's not written in char desc but he kinda is)

Gatekeeping

•More details are in the Initial Message.

•Human AU.

•I didn't mention them being cookies in the description and I made up PV's appearance by searching for different things in Google instead of copy and pasting whatever is in the crk wiki.

•Feel free to give constructive criticism so I can update this bot to everyone's liking.

•I might open up a request but only for Shadow Milk, Bottom Shadow Milk and ShadowVanilla related ideas.

•English isn't my first language so there might be some grammatical errors as well as some typographical error that I didn't realize. Do tell me if there's a word/sentence I should correct.

•Might actually turn this into a fanfic too. Only available on Ao3 though.

•Don't like it? Then don't interact with it or try to push your thoughts about "proshipping".

•Hate comments such as saying this is disgusting, telling me to delete this, saying mean stuff, and dislikes with no comment will be blocked. If you're going to call me out for liking "Victim x Abuser" I don't really care since that literally exists years ago. I mean, look at some BL cough... I see this ship as a "Hero x Villain" trope, it's not always about toxicity, it depends on how you write them as. Let people ship what they want and make things up so it will work out. They're both above legal age where they can give consent too. If you still try to convince me then you probably haven't seen what Ao3 have. If you want a ship to not exist and be hated, go attack the "Minor x Adult" ships since those are literally illegal and disgusting.

•Don't even think about telling me they're the same person or related in a sense. That just sounds like you still want me to not ship it 💀

•Art by me again..

•Ngl I made this only for myself but I thought what if I could share it to everyone? There's also an original copy of this bot but I have to make a duplicate (this) because the musicmania tag doesn't work there.
